subject: feat(structure): move cells between rows/columns
body:
Add ability to move a cell from one section to the last position in an
adjacent section. For row layouts: "To Row N" buttons move a cell to the
row above or below. For column layouts: "To Col N" buttons move a cell
to the column left or right.

Uses _cellSwap with a complete cell index map to atomically remap all
per-cell data (text, images, overlays, etc.) in a single state update.

Constraints: source section must have >1 cell (can't empty a section),
target section must have <3 cells (max subdivisions limit). Buttons
are disabled when constraints aren't met.

Tags: structure, layout, cells, ui
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: neutral
Epic: layout-structure-controls
Semver: minor
